context_rules.description: pull_request_target workflow checks out untrusted pull-request code
context_rules.name: GH_PR_TARGET_UNTRUSTED_CHECKOUT
context_rules.remediation: Use pull_request for untrusted code or avoid checking out PR head code in privileged pull_request_target workflows.

context_rules.description: Terraform exposes SSH administration to the public internet
context_rules.name: TF_PUBLIC_SSH_ADMIN
context_rules.remediation: Restrict SSH ingress to approved private networks or a managed access gateway.

context_rules.description: Terraform exposes RDP administration to the public internet
context_rules.name: TF_PUBLIC_RDP_ADMIN
context_rules.remediation: Restrict RDP ingress to approved private networks or a managed access gateway.

context_rules.description: Kubernetes container adds all Linux capabilities
context_rules.name: K8S_CAP_ADD_ALL
context_rules.remediation: Drop all capabilities and add only individually reviewed requirements.

context_rules.description: Kubernetes workload mounts the host filesystem root
context_rules.name: K8S_HOSTPATH_ROOT
context_rules.remediation: Remove the root hostPath mount and use narrowly scoped managed storage.

context_rules.description: AI-agent instructions download and execute an unverified binary
context_rules.name: AGENT_DOWNLOAD_EXECUTE
context_rules.remediation: Require pinned checksums or signatures and human approval before executing downloaded artifacts.

rules.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: AWS_SECRET_KEY
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: PASSWORD_LITERAL
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: API_KEY_LITERAL
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: TOKEN_LITERAL
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: SECRET_LITERAL
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: CONNECTION_STRING
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: BASE64_SECRET
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: GENERIC_CREDENTIAL
rules.remediation: Remove the value from source, rotate it, and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the key and load a replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the key and load a replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the token and load a scoped replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: GITLAB_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the token and create a least-privilege replacement.

rules.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Rotate the bot token and store it outside source control.

rules.name: DISCORD_WEBHOOK
rules.remediation: Delete the webhook and keep its replacement URL in a secret store.

rules.description: Workflow grants write access to all token scopes
rules.name: CI_WRITE_ALL
rules.remediation: Replace write-all with explicit least-privilege permissions.

rules.description: GitHub Action uses a mutable reference
rules.name: CI_UNPINNED_ACTION
rules.remediation: Pin third-party actions to a reviewed full commit SHA.

rules.name: CONTAINER_PRIVILEGED
rules.remediation: Remove privileged mode and grant only required capabilities.

rules.description: Docker base image uses mutable latest tag
rules.name: DOCKER_LATEST_TAG
rules.remediation: Pin the base image to an immutable version or digest.

rules.description: AI-agent instructions download and execute a remote script
rules.name: AGENT_REMOTE_EXEC
rules.remediation: Require download, verification, review, then explicit execution.

rules.name: AGENT_DISABLE_SECURITY
rules.remediation: Keep security controls enabled and document narrowly scoped exceptions.

rules.description: Remote script is piped directly to a shell
rules.name: REMOTE_SCRIPT_PIPE
rules.remediation: Download, verify, and review the script before execution.

rules.name: AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_KEY
rules.remediation: Rotate the storage account key and load it from an approved secret store.

rules.name: MONGODB_URI_CREDENTIAL
rules.remediation: Rotate the database credential and use a secret-backed connection string.

rules.name: REDIS_URI_CREDENTIAL
rules.remediation: Rotate the Redis credential and use a secret-backed connection string.

rules.name: NPM_AUTH_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the npm token and inject a scoped replacement at runtime.

rules.name: PYPI_API_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the PyPI token and use a scoped trusted-publishing or secret-store credential.

rules.name: AZURE_SAS_SIGNATURE
rules.remediation: Revoke or expire the SAS and generate a least-privilege short-lived replacement.

rules.name: CI_PERSIST_CREDENTIALS
rules.remediation: Set persist-credentials to false unless later authenticated Git operations are required.

rules.description: Reusable workflow inherits all caller secrets
rules.name: CI_INHERIT_ALL_SECRETS
rules.remediation: Pass only explicitly required secrets to the reusable workflow.

rules.description: Terraform ingress allows the entire IPv4 internet
rules.name: TF_WORLD_OPEN_CIDR
rules.remediation: Restrict ingress CIDRs to approved networks.

rules.description: Kubernetes workload explicitly runs as UID 0
rules.name: K8S_RUN_AS_ROOT
rules.remediation: Run the container as a dedicated non-root UID and enforce runAsNonRoot.

rules.name: K8S_PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION
rules.remediation: Set allowPrivilegeEscalation to false and drop unnecessary capabilities.

rules.description: nginx disables upstream TLS certificate verification
rules.name: NGINX_PROXY_TLS_VERIFY_OFF
rules.remediation: Enable proxy_ssl_verify and configure a trusted CA bundle and server name.

rules.name: SYSTEMD_PROTECT_SYSTEM_OFF
rules.remediation: Set ProtectSystem to full or strict and add narrow write exceptions.

rules.description: npm install does not strictly enforce the lockfile
rules.name: NPM_INSTALL_NONDETERMINISTIC
rules.remediation: Use npm ci in CI and container builds to enforce the committed lockfile.

rules.description: pip installs a mutable Git dependency without a commit pin
rules.name: PIP_MUTABLE_GIT_DEPENDENCY
rules.remediation: Pin the Git dependency to a reviewed full commit hash and verify package integrity.

rules.name: AGENT_SKIP_PERMISSIONS
rules.remediation: Remove the bypass flag and require explicit permission boundaries.

rules.name: AGENT_WORLD_WRITABLE
rules.remediation: Use least-privilege ownership and narrowly scoped file modes.

rules.name: SENDGRID_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the SendGrid key and issue a least-privilege replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: TWILIO_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Twilio key and issue a scoped replacement.

rules.name: SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Shopify token and create a least-privilege replacement.

rules.name: DIGITALOCEAN_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the DigitalOcean token and use a scoped replacement.

rules.name: DATADOG_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Datadog key and inject its replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
rules.remediation: Rotate the service-role key and keep it exclusively in a server-side secret store.

rules.description: CI disables Git TLS certificate verification
rules.name: CI_GIT_TLS_VERIFY_DISABLED
rules.remediation: Remove GIT_SSL_NO_VERIFY and configure the correct trusted CA.

rules.name: CI_DIND_TLS_DISABLED
rules.remediation: Enable Docker-in-Docker TLS or use a daemonless isolated builder.

rules.description: Docker Compose grants all Linux capabilities
rules.name: COMPOSE_CAP_ADD_ALL
rules.remediation: Grant only the individual Linux capabilities required by the service.

rules.description: Kubernetes workload uses the host network namespace
rules.name: K8S_HOST_NETWORK
rules.remediation: Disable hostNetwork and expose only required ports through Kubernetes networking.

rules.description: Kubernetes workload uses the host PID namespace
rules.name: K8S_HOST_PID
rules.remediation: Disable hostPID unless a narrowly reviewed operational requirement exists.

rules.description: Terraform explicitly enables public network access
rules.name: TF_PUBLIC_NETWORK_ACCESS
rules.remediation: Disable public network access and use approved private endpoints.

rules.description: systemd permits acquisition of new privileges
rules.name: SYSTEMD_NO_NEW_PRIVILEGES_OFF
rules.remediation: Set NoNewPrivileges=true unless explicitly incompatible with the service.

rules.description: npm lifecycle scripts are explicitly forced on
rules.name: NPM_FORCE_INSTALL_SCRIPTS
rules.remediation: Do not force lifecycle scripts on; review required scripts and run them explicitly.

rules.description: pip trusted-host bypasses TLS host verification
rules.name: PIP_TRUSTED_HOST
rules.remediation: Remove trusted-host and configure a repository with a valid trusted certificate.

rules.description: npm registry TLS verification is disabled
rules.name: NPM_STRICT_SSL_DISABLED
rules.remediation: Enable strict SSL and configure the correct trusted CA.

rules.description: AI-agent instructions disable process or browser sandboxing
rules.name: AGENT_NO_SANDBOX
rules.remediation: Keep sandboxing enabled and document any narrowly scoped exception.

rules.description: AI-agent instructions perform destructive Git reset
rules.name: AGENT_DESTRUCTIVE_GIT_RESET
rules.remediation: Use non-destructive Git inspection and require explicit human approval for destructive resets.

rules.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Cloudflare token and issue a least-privilege replacement.

rules.name: SENTRY_DSN_CREDENTIAL
rules.remediation: Rotate the Sentry DSN credential and inject it from an approved configuration store.

rules.name: LINEAR_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Linear key and create a scoped replacement.

rules.name: NOTION_INTEGRATION_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Notion token and create a least-privilege replacement.

rules.name: MAILGUN_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Mailgun key and create a scoped replacement.

rules.name: POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Rotate the Postmark server token and inject it from a secret store.

rules.description: GitHub Actions insecure command protocol is enabled
rules.name: CI_ACTIONS_UNSECURE_COMMANDS
rules.remediation: Remove ACTIONS_ALLOW_UNSECURE_COMMANDS and use environment files for workflow commands.

rules.description: CI disables Node.js TLS certificate verification
rules.name: CI_NODE_TLS_DISABLED
rules.remediation: Restore TLS verification and configure the correct trusted CA.

rules.name: COMPOSE_SECCOMP_UNCONFINED
rules.remediation: Use the runtime default or a narrowly tailored seccomp profile.

rules.name: COMPOSE_APPARMOR_UNCONFINED
rules.remediation: Apply the runtime default or an approved AppArmor profile.

rules.description: Kubernetes container root filesystem is explicitly writable
rules.name: K8S_WRITABLE_ROOT_FS
rules.remediation: Set readOnlyRootFilesystem to true and mount only required writable paths.

rules.description: Kubernetes service-account token is explicitly automounted
rules.name: K8S_AUTOMOUNT_SA_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Disable token automount unless the workload explicitly needs Kubernetes API access.

rules.name: TF_STORAGE_ENCRYPTION_OFF
rules.remediation: Enable storage encryption and use an approved key policy.

rules.description: pip uses an unencrypted package index
rules.name: PIP_HTTP_INDEX
rules.remediation: Use an authenticated HTTPS package index with a valid trusted certificate.

rules.description: npm uses an unencrypted package registry
rules.name: NPM_HTTP_REGISTRY
rules.remediation: Use an authenticated HTTPS npm registry with a valid trusted certificate.

rules.description: Go module security bypass applies to all domains
rules.name: GO_INSECURE_WILDCARD
rules.remediation: Remove the wildcard and use authenticated HTTPS module sources.

rules.description: AI-agent instructions recursively delete the filesystem root
rules.name: AGENT_DELETE_ROOT
rules.remediation: Remove destructive root deletion and require narrowly scoped, reviewed cleanup paths.

rules.name: AGENT_DISABLE_AUDIT_LOGGING
rules.remediation: Keep audit logging enabled and document reviewed redaction requirements.

rules.name: GITHUB_FINE_GRAINED_PAT
rules.remediation: Revoke the fine-grained PAT and create a least-privilege replacement.

rules.name: SLACK_APP_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Slack app token and load a replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: STRIPE_RESTRICTED_KEY
rules.remediation: Roll the restricted key and preserve only required Stripe permissions.

rules.name: PULUMI_ACCESS_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Pulumi token and use a scoped replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: DOPPLER_PERSONAL_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Doppler personal token and issue a replacement.

rules.name: REPLICATE_API_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Replicate token and load a replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: GROQ_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Groq key and load a replacement from a secret store.

rules.name: LANGSMITH_API_KEY

rules.name: PINECONE_API_KEY

rules.name: GRAFANA_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN

rules.name: SENTRY_ORG_AUTH_TOKEN

rules.name: TERRAFORM_CLOUD_TOKEN

rules.name: VAULT_SERVICE_TOKEN

rules.name: VAULT_BATCH_TOKEN

rules.name: NEW_RELIC_USER_KEY

rules.name: CIRCLECI_PERSONAL_TOKEN

rules.name: ONEPASSWORD_SECRET_KEY

rules.name: AGE_SECRET_KEY

rules.name: AIRTABLE_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN

rules.name: CLICKHOUSE_CLOUD_API_SECRET

rules.name: CLOUDFLARE_ORIGIN_CA_KEY

rules.name: LANGSMITH_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the LangSmith API key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_API_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Cloudflare account API token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: RESEND_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Resend API key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: FIREWORKS_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Fireworks API key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: FIREWORKS_FIRE_PASS_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Fireworks Fire Pass key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Supabase secret key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET
rules.remediation: Rotate the Stripe webhook endpoint secret and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.description: PostHog feature flags secure API key
rules.name: POSTHOG_FEATURE_FLAGS_SECURE_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the PostHog feature flags secure API key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: POSTHOG_OAUTH_ACCESS_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the PostHog OAuth access token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: OKTA_API_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Okta API token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DOPPLER_SERVICE_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Doppler service token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DOPPLER_CONFIG_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Doppler config token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DOPPLER_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Doppler service account token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DOPPLER_SCIM_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Doppler SCIM token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DOPPLER_AUDIT_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Doppler audit token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.description: Tailscale API, auth, or OAuth key
rules.name: TAILSCALE_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Tailscale key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: TAILSCALE_SCIM_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Tailscale SCIM key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: TAILSCALE_CLIENT_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Tailscale client key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: TAILSCALE_WEBHOOK_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Tailscale webhook key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: VAULT_RECOVERY_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Vault recovery token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: HONEYCOMB_INGEST_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Honeycomb ingest API key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: ONE_PASSWORD_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the 1Password service account token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: MAPBOX_SECRET_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Mapbox secret token and create a new one with URL restrictions.

rules.name: CONFLUENT_CLOUD_API_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Confluent Cloud API key and secret and replace them through a managed secret store.

rules.name: SENTRY_USER_APP_AUTH_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the Sentry user app auth token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: HONEYCOMB_ENVIRONMENT_KEY
rules.remediation: Revoke the Honeycomb environment API key and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DIGITALOCEAN_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the DigitalOcean personal access token and replace it through a managed secret store.

rules.name: DIGITALOCEAN_OAUTH_TOKEN
rules.remediation: Revoke the DigitalOcean OAuth token and replace it through a managed secret store.
